mapper.select: select a.* from (select a.write_year , a.doc_type , a.doc_no , a.plan_nm , b.doc_seq , b.hazards_factor , c.process_nm , d.work_content , e.class_nm as hazards_classification_nm , (select count(*) from esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation_reduction z where z.write_year = b.write_year and z.doc_type = b.doc_type and z.doc_no = b.doc_no and z.doc_seq = b.doc_seq and z.use_yn = 'Y' and nullif(z.completed_date, '') is not null) as improvement_cnt from esg.tb_risk_assessment_plan a inner join esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation b on b.write_year = a.write_year and b.doc_type = a.doc_type and b.doc_no = a.doc_no and b.use_yn = 'Y' left join esg.tb_process_info c on c.process_id = b.process_id left join esg.tb_process_work d on d.prcs_work_id = b.prcs_work_id left join esg.tb_classification_hazards_factor_mgmt e on e.factor_id = b.hazards_type and e.class_id = b.hazards_classification where 1 = 1 and a.comp_id = #{compId} and a.write_year = #{writeYear} and a.use_yn = 'Y') a where a.improvement_cnt > 0 order by a.doc_no, a.doc_seq

select a.write_year , a.doc_type , a.doc_no , a.plan_nm , a.risk_assessment_standards , a.risk_allowance_standards , b.doc_seq , b.hazards_cause , b.hazards_factor , b.related_evidence , b.current_safety_measures , tlm.legal_nm , i.minor_nm as frequency_score , j.minor_nm as impact_score , b.risk_score , c.process_nm , d.work_content , e.class_nm as hazards_classification_nm , f.reduction_measures , f.expected_date , f.completed_date , k.minor_nm as after_frequency_score , l.minor_nm as after_impact_score , tcd5.minor_nm as after_risk_score , f.impl_content , g.hr_id , h.hr_nm , za.file_id as prev_file_id , zb.file_id as after_file_id from esg.tb_risk_assessment_plan a inner join esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation b on b.write_year = a.write_year and b.doc_type = a.doc_type and b.doc_no = a.doc_no left join esg.tb_legal_manage tlm on tlm.legal_id = b.legal_id and tlm.comp_id = #{compId} left join esg.tb_process_info c on c.process_id = b.process_id left join esg.tb_process_work d on d.prcs_work_id = b.prcs_work_id left join esg.tb_classification_hazards_factor_mgmt e on e.factor_id = b.hazards_type and e.class_id = b.hazards_classification inner join esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation_reduction f on f.write_year = b.write_year and f.doc_type = b.doc_type and f.doc_no = b.doc_no and f.doc_seq = b.doc_seq left join esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation_reduction_hr g on g.write_year = f.write_year and g.doc_type = f.doc_type and g.doc_no = f.doc_no and g.doc_seq = f.doc_seq and g.doc_seq_detail = f.doc_seq_detail left join esg.tb_hr_info h on h.hr_id = g.hr_id left join esg.tb_common_d i on i.major_cd = 'C0038' and i.minor_cd = b.frequency_score left join esg.tb_common_d j on j.major_cd = 'C0039' and j.minor_cd = b.impact_score left join esg.tb_common_d k on k.major_cd = 'C0038' and k.minor_cd = b.after_frequency_score left join esg.tb_common_d l on l.major_cd = 'C0039' and l.minor_cd = b.after_impact_score left join esg.tb_common_d tcd5 on tcd5.major_cd = 'C0040' and tcd5.minor_cd = b.after_risk_score left join esg.tb_sys_file za on za.target_type = 'RAP' and za.target_id = f.write_year||f.doc_no||f.doc_seq||f.doc_seq_detail||'A' left join esg.tb_sys_file zb on zb.target_type = 'RAP' and zb.target_id = f.write_year||f.doc_no||f.doc_seq||f.doc_seq_detail||'B' where 1 = 1 and a.write_year = #{writeYear} and a.doc_type = #{docType} and a.doc_no = #{docNo} and a.comp_id = #{compId} and b.doc_seq = #{docSeq} and nullif(f.completed_date, '') is not null order by f.doc_seq_detail

select a.risk_assessment_standards , c.process_nm , b.hazards_factor , e.minor_nm as frequency_score , f.minor_nm as impact_score , tcd1.minor_nm as risk_score , g.minor_nm as after_frequency_score , h.minor_nm as after_impact_score , tcd2.minor_nm as after_risk_score , d.impl_content , d.reduction_measures , (select string_agg(zz.hr_nm||'('||zzz.orgn_nm||')', ', ') from esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation_reduction_hr z left join esg.tb_hr_info zz on zz.hr_id = z.hr_id left join esg.tb_orgn_info zzz on zzz.orgn_id = zz.orgn_id where z.write_year = d.write_year and z.doc_type = d.doc_type and z.doc_no = d.doc_no and z.doc_seq = d.doc_seq and z.doc_seq_detail = d.doc_seq_detail) as work_detail_hrs , d.completed_date , za.file_id as prev_file_id , zb.file_id as after_file_id from esg.tb_risk_assessment_plan a inner join esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation b on b.write_year = a.write_year and b.doc_type = a.doc_type and b.doc_no = a.doc_no left join esg.tb_process_info c on c.process_id = b.process_id inner join esg.tb_risk_assessment_implementation_reduction d on d.write_year = b.write_year and d.doc_type = b.doc_type and d.doc_no = b.doc_no and d.doc_seq = b.doc_seq left join esg.tb_common_d e on e.major_cd = 'C0038' and e.minor_cd = b.frequency_score left join esg.tb_common_d f on f.major_cd = 'C0039' and f.minor_cd = b.impact_score left join esg.tb_common_d g on g.major_cd = 'C0038' and g.minor_cd = b.after_frequency_score left join esg.tb_common_d h on h.major_cd = 'C0039' and h.minor_cd = b.after_impact_score left join esg.tb_common_d tcd1 on tcd1.major_cd = 'C0040' and tcd1.minor_cd = b.risk_score left join esg.tb_common_d tcd2 on tcd2.major_cd = 'C0040' and tcd2.minor_cd = b.after_risk_score left join esg.tb_sys_file za on za.target_type = 'RAP' and za.target_id = d.write_year||d.doc_no||d.doc_seq||d.doc_seq_detail||'A' left join esg.tb_sys_file zb on zb.target_type = 'RAP' and zb.target_id = d.write_year||d.doc_no||d.doc_seq||d.doc_seq_detail||'B' where 1 = 1 and d.write_year = #{writeYear} and d.doc_type = #{docType} and d.doc_no = #{docNo} and d.doc_seq = #{docSeq} and nullif(d.completed_date, '') is not null order by d.doc_seq_detail
